articles.author: Rahim Amir
articles.title: HP announces the most powerful Windows AI PC ever built — Nvidia GB300 workstation can handle one trillion parameters thanks to its 784GB unified memory, but it won't be cheap - TechRadar
articles.description: The PC comes packed with a GB300 superchip and 20 petaflops FP4 compute
articles.content: <ul><li>HP recently debuted multiple devices that cater to AI developers at Computex, which are powered by Nvidia's GPUs, including the DGX Spark and the GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Desktop Superchip… [+3464 chars]
